title: Printer and Scanner Mechanisms, Consumables, and Image Formation
description: A shared office sees faded pages, repeated marks, color shifts, jams, unreadable scans, and high consumable cost across laser, inkjet, thermal, and impact devices. Learners cumulatively produce print-scan mechanism and symptom map through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Compare laser, inkjet, thermal, impact, multifunction, document scanner, flatbed, ADF, duplex, and specialty-device mechanisms and use cases.
Trace laser processing, charging, exposing, developing, transferring, fusing, and cleaning to component-specific symptoms.
Trace ink delivery and heads, thermal media and heating, and impact ribbons and feed paths to their characteristic failure evidence.
